title: Sample planning questions
sourceSummary: Sanitized sample packet for testing deck import only.

welcome.title: A few questions before we continue
welcome.body: Please answer what you can. It is fine to say when something needs follow-up.
welcome.privacy: Only WAWCO can review these answers.

questions.prompt: Which path should we prioritize first?
questions.contextText: Choose the answer that best matches the next useful step.
questions.recommendationRationale: If you are unsure, choose review first so we can narrow the decision together.

questions.prompt: Is there anything else we should know before continuing?
Can WAWCO use these answers for internal planning?
questions.approvalText: Yes, WAWCO can use these answers for internal review and planning.
